headline: Exxon Mobil Faces Kazakhstan Fine And Golden Pass LNG Setbacks
summary: A Kazakhstan court upholds a US$5b environmental fine against North Caspian Operating Co., a joint venture that includes Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM). Exxon Mobil withdraws initial LNG cargoes from the new Golden Pass export plant following start-up issues. Exxon Mobil, one of the largest integrated oil and gas companies, is now dealing with two very different types of challenges across its global portfolio. The upheld US$5b environmental penalty tied to the North Caspian Operating Co. joint...
